questions.text: What is the key advantage of a sparse MoE model over a dense model of equal parameter size?
options: It scales the parameter size while keeping active flops (compute cost) constant per token.
It eliminates the need for activations.
questions.correct_answer: It scales the parameter size while keeping active flops (compute cost) constant per token.
questions.explanation: Since each token is routed to only a subset of experts (Top-K), only those weights are computed, keeping flops constant.
